name: winuel
description: Winuel Forum - A modern forum system based on cloud-native technology

scripts.dev: cd frontend && pnpm dev & cd backend && pnpm dev
scripts.build: cd packages/shared-core && pnpm build && cd ../shared-api && pnpm build && cd ../shared-config && pnpm build && cd ../shared-stores && pnpm build && cd ../shared-ui && pnpm build && cd ../plugin-system && pnpm build && cd ../../backend && pnpm build && cd ../frontend && pnpm build &&
scripts.build:shared: cd packages/shared-core && pnpm build && cd ../shared-api && pnpm build && cd ../shared-config && pnpm build && cd ../shared-stores && pnpm build && cd ../shared-ui && pnpm build && cd ../plugin-system && pnpm build
scripts.lint: cd frontend && pnpm lint && cd ../backend && pnpm lint
scripts.clean: cd backend && pnpm clean && cd ../frontend && pnpm clean &&
